name: The Elder Wand
description: An immensely powerful wand. Changes your cursor magic.

description: A wand of fiery power and loyalty. Changes your cursor magic.

name: Snowy Owl
description: A loyal companion. Grants +10% XP in all games.

description: He gets lost often, but grants +5% XP in all games.
